Jian Li
Associate Researcher
IEEE Senior Member, ACM Member, CCF Member

I'm an Associate Researcher with the School of Cyber Science and Technology, University of Science and Technology of China. My research interests include quantum networking, network security, and wireless networks.

lijian9(at)ustc.edu.cn
Google Scholar GitHub WeChat ORCID Infonet Lab QN Lab

    Department of Electronic Engineering and Information Science

News (view all )
2025
Jul. 2025, I'm invited to serve as Editor for the IEEE Transactions on Communications (area Optical & Quantum Communications)!
Featured
Jun. 2025, I receive Internet Technical Committee (ITC) Early Career Award 2025 from IEEE Communications Society!
Featured
2024
Dec. 2024, I serve as TPC Co-Chair in IEEE IWCMC 2025 QNC! Welcome to submit your valuable work!
Featured
Aug. 2024, our team receive Second Class Prize in the Seventennth National College Student Information Security Contest (2024-第十七届全国大学生信息安全竞赛 -—作品赛)!
Featured
2023
Aug. 2023, I receive the elevation to the grade of IEEE Senior Member!
Featured
